issues.description: Found a marker 'TODO' in the comments

summary: After 3 lint/format cycles, 19 warnings remain across 2 files. All remaining warnings are COM01 (TODO markers in comments). The Robocop formatter cannot remove TODO markers as they are semantic content. To resolve, remove TODO comments by human developer or disable via configuration: --configure COM01:enabled=False
